description: Global store settings - store name, logo, contact info, delivery fees, and other configuration

endpoints.name: Get Store Settings
endpoints.description: Retrieve all store settings as a key-value map

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Loads store-wide configuration including store name, logo, phone numbers, social links, delivery fees, currency, etc. Used across both storefront and admin.

body.description: Additional keys for phone, whatsapp, social links, etc.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Not displayed as a page - values populate store header (name/logo), footer (contact info), checkout (delivery fee), and various UI components

endpoints.name: Update Store Setting
endpoints.description: Update a single store setting by key name

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin saves a setting change. Updates one key-value pair at a time.
frontendUsage.note: Uses authorizeRoles('admin') instead of 'super_admin'/'store_manager' - may be intentional or a bug

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, setting value updates in the admin settings form
